zh.lifeSummary: 當Ancilla von Lenzburg於0984年出生在瑞士阿高倫茲包格時，她的父親Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste44歲，母親Aldiud47歲。她於1000年之前與Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1030年在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊苗隆享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ancilla von Lenzburg于0984年出生在瑞士阿高倫茲包格时，她的父亲Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste44岁，母亲Aldiud47岁。她于1000年之前与Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1030年在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊苗隆享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ancilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Nunzio, Paolo.
Italian (Sicily): from a diminutive of Canci, from a short form of Cancelliere .

variants.name: Cancelliere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Antonio, Domenic, Enrico.
Italian (southern): occupational name from cancelliere ‘chancellor, clerk’, from Old French chancelier ‘chancellor’ (from Late Latin cancellarius ‘usher’).

en.lifeSummary: When Ancilla von Lenzburg was born in 0984, in Lenzburg, Aargau, Switzerland, her father, Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste, was 44 and her mother, Aldiud, was 47. She married Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia before 1000. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1030, in Hermillon, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ancilla von Lenzburg est née en 0984, à Lenzburg, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Aldiud, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia avant 1000. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1030, à Hermillon, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ancilla von Lenzburg 0984 in Lenzburg, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste 44 und ihre Mutter Aldiud 47. Sie hat vor 1000 Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1030 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Hermillon, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ancilla von Lenzburg è nata il nel 0984 nel Lenzburg, Argovia, Svizzera, sua padre, Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Aldiud, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia prima del 1000. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1030, nel Hermillon, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Lenzburg, Aargau, Switzerland: スイスアールガウレンズブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Ancilla von Lenzburgが0984年にスイスアールガウレンズブルグで生まれた時，父Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aosteは44歳，母Aldiudは47歳であった。1000年以前にConte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1030年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイハーミロンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ancilla von Lenzburg(이)가 0984년 스위스 아아르가 렌즈버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aldiud(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1000년 이전 Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1030년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 허미런에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ancilla von Lenzburg nasceu em 0984, em Lenzburg, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Aldiud, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia antes 1000. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1030, em Hermillon, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ancilla von Lenzburg родилась в 0984 г. в местности лензбург, ааргау, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Aldiud, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia перед 1000 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1030 г. в местности хирмиллон, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ancilla von Lenzburg nació en 0984, en Lenzburg, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Anselm II von Lenzburg eveque d'Aoste, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Aldiud, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Conte Umberto I Biancamano di Savoia antes de 1000. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1030, en Hermillon, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
